item.title: Why is ITC Hotels Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, ITC Hotels Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling 3.13% to close at ₹153.15, marking a fresh 52-week and all-time low of ₹152 during intraday trading. This downturn reflects broader sectoral pressures and persistent technical weaknesses in the stock’s performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, Sanofi Consumer Healthcare India Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 3.14% to close at ₹4,216.35. This drop reflects a continuation of recent downward momentum amid valuation pressures and underwhelming relative market performance. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Akums Drugs & Pharmaceuticals Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Akums Drugs & Pharmaceuticals Ltd witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling by 5.87% to close at Rs 469.10. This drop reflects a combination of recent underperformance, investor caution, and underlying company fundamentals that have weighed on market sentiment. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Gopal Snacks Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Gopal Snacks Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 4.69% to ₹269.50, reflecting investor concerns despite recent positive quarterly results. The decline is underscored by underperformance relative to both its sector and the broader market benchmarks. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, Capital Small Finance Bank Ltd’s shares fell sharply to a new 52-week and all-time low of ₹236, declining by 2.44% during the trading session and continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen the stock drop by 6.52% in total. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, Vinyas Innovative Technologies Ltd experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.9% to close at ₹929.85. This drop reflects a combination of underperformance relative to its sector and weakening investor participation, signalling caution among market participants. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Acutaas Chemicals Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13 Mar, Acutaas Chemicals Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.96% to close at ₹2,080.60. This drop comes amid a three-day losing streak, despite the company’s robust long-term growth and impressive financial metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is HP Adhesives Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, HP Adhesives Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, closing at ₹32.20, down ₹1.05 or 3.16% from the previous close. This drop reflects a continuation of a sustained downward trend that has seen the stock underperform both its sector and the broader market benchmarks over multiple time frames. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Fusion Finance Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Fusion Finance Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply, declining by 4.96% to ₹159.05, reflecting mounting concerns over its recent performance and underlying fundamentals despite some positive longer-term returns. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Metro Brands Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Metro Brands Ltd’s stock price has fallen by 1.64% to ₹935.00, reflecting ongoing challenges despite some strong quarterly financial results. The stock’s decline is influenced by a combination of underwhelming long-term growth, valuation concerns, and subdued investor participation, which have outweighed recent operational improvements. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is NDR Auto Components Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, NDR Auto Components Ltd has experienced a notable decline in its share price, falling 5.0% to ₹656.00. This drop reflects a broader trend of underperformance relative to both its sector and benchmark indices, driven by valuation pressures and subdued investor participation despite the company’s strong long-term growth metrics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Scan Projects Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: Scan Projects Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.98% to ₹84.21, reflecting a sharper drop than the broader market indices over the past week despite its impressive long-term gains. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Moksh Ornaments Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Moksh Ornaments Ltd has seen its share price fall to ₹11.31, down 1.65% on the day, hitting a fresh 52-week low. This decline reflects a combination of underwhelming financial performance, subdued long-term growth prospects, and valuation challenges relative to market benchmarks and peers. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Shanti Educational Initiatives Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Shanti Educational Initiatives Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling 4.17% to ₹166.70. This drop follows a three-day losing streak, reflecting a complex interplay of strong long-term growth metrics overshadowed by recent operational setbacks and waning investor confidence. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Zota Health Care Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Zota Health Care Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 4.16% to ₹1,121.80, reflecting mounting concerns over the company’s deteriorating financial health despite its strong historical returns and growing institutional interest. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Mahindra Logistics Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Mahindra Logistics Ltd witnessed a notable decline in its share price, falling by 4.57% to close at ₹379.00. This drop comes despite the company’s strong fundamentals and impressive year-to-date gains, reflecting a complex interplay of sectoral pressures and short-term market dynamics. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Manorama Industries Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: As of 13-Mar, Manorama Industries Ltd’s stock price has fallen sharply by 4.38% to ₹1,269.55, continuing a three-day losing streak that has seen the share price drop by 7.72%. This decline comes despite the company’s robust financial performance and long-term growth trajectory. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is AU Small Finance Bank Ltd falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, AU Small Finance Bank Ltd’s stock price declined by 2.02% to close at ₹884.20, continuing a three-day losing streak amid broader sector weakness and short-term technical pressures, despite the bank’s robust long-term fundamentals and strong institutional backing. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is Jyothy Labs Ltd. falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, Jyothy Labs Ltd. witnessed a significant decline in its share price, falling 4.36% to close at ₹219.30, marking a fresh 52-week low and continuing a downward trend that has persisted over the past week. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Why is GACM Technologies Ltd-DVR falling/rising?
item.description: On 13-Mar, GACM Technologies Ltd-DVR recorded a modest rise of 2.27%, closing at ₹0.45, reflecting a slight recovery within a broader context of sustained underperformance against the benchmark Sensex and its sector peers. Time: 1 hour ago
